questions.question:
A static pod manifest already exists at `/etc/kubernetes/manifests/audit-agent.yaml`, but it is not configured for the intended host-network audit workload.

Update the static pod manifest so that:
- the Pod name remains `audit-agent`
- the Pod runs in namespace `staticpod-lab`
- the container image remains `busybox:1.36`
- `hostNetwork` is set to `true`
- the container command continuously prints `static-pod-audit` every 30 seconds
- the mirror Pod becomes Running in namespace `staticpod-lab`

Do not replace this with a normal Pod or Deployment. Fix the static pod manifest in place.

verification.description: The static pod manifest keeps the intended Pod identity and host-network command configuration
The mirror Pod for audit-agent is Running in staticpod-lab with host networking enabled
The static pod emits the expected audit log line from the corrected command loop
